entities.name: Meeting Block System
entities.context: Framework for organizing meeting preparation using numbered blocks (B01-B31) with tiered priority levels

entities.name: INVESTOR meetings
entities.context: Meeting category requiring 7 base blocks plus 4 high-priority blocks (11 total)

entities.name: NETWORKING meetings
entities.context: Meeting category requiring 7 base blocks plus 2 high-priority blocks (9 total)

entities.name: CUSTOMER meetings
entities.context: Meeting category requiring 7 base blocks plus 4 high-priority blocks (11 total)

entities.name: COMMUNITY meetings
entities.context: Meeting category requiring 7 base blocks plus 2 high-priority blocks (9 total)

entities.name: Pilot Intelligence
entities.context: Conditional block (B06) generated only when pilot was explicitly discussed with specifics

entities.name: Metrics Snapshot
entities.context: Conditional block (B11) generated only when 3+ substantive metrics were discussed

entities.name: Stakeholder Map
entities.context: Conditional block (B15) generated only when multiple stakeholders with complex dynamics exist

entities.name: Tier 3 Conditional Blocks
entities.context: Category of blocks generated only when explicitly triggered by specific conditions

entities.name: Block Registry
entities.context: Reference containing guidance principles for generating each block
